items.title: I would add the three key Supreme Court rulings that gave the media power in the 20th Century
items.author: J.A. Adande
items.body_excerpt:
I would add the three key Supreme Court rulings that gave the media power in the 20th Century

Near v. Minnesota in 1931 (no prior restraint)

Times v. Sullivan in 1964 (malicious intent standard)

Times v. United States in 1971 (Pentagon Papers)

items.title: In 53 of the 79 #NBA Finals played, the champions have been one of the two No. 1 seeds that season, which accounts for 67.1% of the Finals.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
In 53 of the 79 #NBA Finals played, the champions have been one of the two No. 1 seeds that season, which accounts for 67.1% of the Finals.

The Spurs-Knicks series is the 16th NBA Finals to feature no No. 1 seed.

The previous one was in 2022: Warriors (3rd) 4-2 Celtics (2nd).

(via CrazyStats)
